name: PeopleConnect cluster
notes: Treat this as a parent cluster: one suppression can cover multiple PeopleConnect front ends.
For search-visibility removal, prefer maintained suppression over account/data deletion; verify the current portal text before acting.
The guided flow may require date of birth. Collect it only if the operator explicitly agrees.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: Whitepages
notes: Email lane avoids phone callback friction when available; include confirmed listing URLs only.
Re-scan after processing. Hidden from free search is not the same as verified deletion.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: Spokeo
notes: Multiple listings per person are common. Submit each confirmed listing URL separately.
Use a follow-up deletion draft when the goal is broader deletion beyond listing suppression.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: BeenVerified
notes: Parent for several Lifetime Value Co. people-search properties. Re-scan covered children after the parent confirms.
Use deletion drafts for broader data deletion; do not assume all sister properties cleared automatically.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: FamilyTreeNow
notes: Use the public opt-out endpoint after confirming the exact record. Re-listing risk is high, so schedule a re-scan.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: Radaris
notes: The form may require a per-person numbered profile URL. Do not use a relative or namesake URL.
If the exact profile URL is unavailable, draft an email naming only the subject's own displayed details.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: TruePeopleSearch
notes: Ignore page titles or intro text that merely echo the query. Record found only on a real result card corroborated by address, phone, or other strong signal.
Do not bypass anti-bot or CAPTCHA gates. Queue a human task when the form blocks automation.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use

name: Nuwber
notes: Needs a confirmed profile URL. Use draft/email fallback only if a current official privacy contact is verified.
source: starter catalog; verify live before use
